title: Souls' Coffer
description: Souls' Coffer is the artwork that inspired my @wynwoodmuralfest share of the wall in 2021 with @giuliorosk. The artwork came into existence in 2020 in the middle of the lockdown. Unable to express myself on walls, I dedicated my time to producing canvases. When next year I had the chance to paint in Miami, I decided to 'free the artwork', just as the octopus does by breaking the chains and freeing the souls from the coffer to give them another life.
